description: Add structural primitives for missing CVE reachability: window functions, self-referential generated columns, count() zero-arg, ORDER BY 3-term
changes: Added 15 window function rules (lead, lag, row_number, rank, dense_rank, ntile, first_value, last_value, nth_value, percent_rank, cume_dist), 3 self-referential GenCol-Expr rules, 3 explicit self-ref Col-Def-List-GenCol templates, 1 count() zero-arg rule, 1 ORDER BY 3-term rule. Total +23 rules over v3.1.
